// Source: https://github.com/NoSloppy/ProffieOS3-eval/blob/master/config/s3config.h
// NoSloppy Sabertrio config — Simple RandomFlicker base with RotateColorsX<Variation>
// Common foundation: per-LED random flicker between two color variants of base hue.
// RotateColorsX with Variation lets users customize base color via menu.
StylePtr<Layers<RandomFlicker<RotateColorsX<Variation,DodgerBlue>,RotateColorsX<Variation,Rgb<0,20,128>>>,InOutTrL<TrWipe<300>,TrWipeIn<600>,Black>>>()
